case_title: PRUTHVIRAJ DESAI VS. KIMBERLY ALLEN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, KIMBERLY AKA KIMBERLY MARTIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, KIMBERLY AKA KIMBERLY MARTIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 493 EDDY STREET, #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESAI, PRUTHVIRAJ AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, KIMBERLY AKA KIMBERLY MARTIN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
